title: Smelter's Pickaxe Remastered
description: A plugin that adds a pickaxe that auto-smelts ores
body:
🔥 Smelter’s Pickaxe 🔥

⛏️ What it does
• Automatically smelts mined ores
• Iron Ore → Iron Ingot
• Gold Ore → Gold Ingot
• No furnace needed
• Faster and more efficient mining

🔥 When an ore is smelted, fire particles appear


---

🛠️ Crafting Recipe
🔧 Crafted like an Iron Pickaxe, but with a twist:
• Standard Iron Pickaxe shape
• ⬅️➡️ 2× Coal placed in the middle left & middle right slots
• Everything else stays the same


---

⚙️ Configuration
• Fully configurable config file
• Enable / disable auto-smelting
• Change which blocks smelt
• Toggle fire particles
• Customize messages, permissions, and more
• Designed to be easily adjustable to your server’s needs


---

💻 Command
/smelterspickaxe give

🔐 Permission
smelterspickaxe.give


---

🔥 Mine smarter. Smelt instantly.
